title: Fig. 17 in Amphicticeps and Amphicynodon (Arctoidea, Carnivora) from Hsanda Gol Formation, Central Mongolia and Phylogeny of Basal Arctoids with Comments on Zoogeography
author: WANG, XIAOMING
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 17. Cladistic relationships of basal arctoids based on a strict consensus tree from 36 shortest trees (tree length 5 89 steps) that were recovered from Branch and Bound method in the PAUP program (Swofford, 1993 version 3.1.1) on the 22 taxa 3 39 characters data matrix (table 8). Character distributions are optimized using ClaDos program (version 1.2 by Kevin Nixon): solid bars are synapomorphies and open bars are homoplastic characters (parallelisms and reversals); numbers above the branches are character numbers and those below the branches are character states.
